title: Galaxy S26 Ultra Brings Chile’s Unmapped Landscapes to Google Street View
content: Samsung Electronics has launched “Chile Expanding the Map,” an initiative designed to showcase remote and lesser-known locations across Chile that do not appear on digital maps. The project encourages Samsung Electronics has launched “Chile Expanding the Map,” an initiative designed to showcase remote and lesser-known locations across Chile that do not appear on digital maps.
